title: Retrieve 'Emails & Activities' history, then create into another account - API

posts.author: JiaTang (Jia Tang)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I have CRM in monday.com and did data migration from one account to another. However, my outlook ''Emails & Activities" histories has been lost in item level.

I wonder if it is possible to retrieve the email history from ’ Emails & Activities’ item view via monday API? Then I can migrate those data into new account.

Looking forward to your response.
Thank you very much in advance!

Best Regards,
Jia

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JiaTang !

It’s definitely not the best workaround, but you can create them as updates through the API and structure them to include the information such as sender, dates etc. in a template-ized way that will be easy for the users to read.

Unfortunately I believe that at least for now, this is the best solution available.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: pdotc (Peter Carlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: How would you do that - where in the API for E&A can you retrieve and/or convert e-mails and activities to updates? Thanks @GiannisKoukounas

posts.author: YingTM (Ying)
posts.cookedHtml:
was there any update on this?
Trying to export all the activity from Emails & Activity. thanks!
